'''rasanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachasu|kachasu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachasu|kachasu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rasanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræsængæth|ræsængæth]] || [[word:ræsængæj|ræsængæj]] || [[word:ræsængæsh|ræsængæsh]] || [[word:ræsængæ|ræsængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rasasangath|rasasangath]] || [[word:rasasangaj|rasasangaj]] || [[word:rasasangash|rasasangash]] || [[word:rasasanga|rasasanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rasangath|rasangath]] || [[word:rasangaj|rasangaj]] || [[word:rasangash|rasangash]] || [[word:rasanga|rasanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rasafngath|rasafngath]] || [[word:rasafngaj|rasafngaj]] || [[word:rasafngash|rasafngash]] || [[word:rasafngaf|rasafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rasangatha|rasangatha]] || [[word:rasangaja|rasangaja]] || [[word:rasangasha|rasangasha]] || [[word:rasangaka|rasangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rasangath|rasangath]] || [[word:rasangaj|rasangaj]] || [[word:rasangash|rasangash]] || [[word:rasanga|rasanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rasangathal|rasangathal]] || [[word:rasangajal|rasangajal]] || [[word:rasangashal|rasangashal]] || [[word:rasangakal|rasangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rasangathatha|rasangathatha]] || [[word:rasangajaja|rasangajaja]] || [[word:rasangashasha|rasangashasha]] || [[word:rasangaka|rasangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rasangathan|rasangathan]] || [[word:rasangajan|rasangajan]] || [[word:rasangashan|rasangashan]] || [[word:rasangakan|rasangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rasangathaoro|rasangathaoro]] || [[word:rasangajaoro|rasangajaoro]] || [[word:rasangashaoro|rasangashaoro]] || [[word:rasangakaoro|rasangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
